content.scenarioHint: 你在国际学生服务中心，想礼貌地向工作人员询问关于校园住宿申请的更多信息。
content.speakerText: Could you tell me more about how to apply for on-campus housing?
content.speakerTextCn: 您能告诉我如何申请校内住宿吗？
expectedAnswers: Sure! You need to submit your application through the student portal before the deadline, and then you’ll get a confirmation email.
Of course! First, complete the online form, then upload your enrollment proof—most students get assigned within two weeks.
Absolutely! The process is straightforward: apply early, choose your preferences, and keep an eye on your email for updates.
Yeah, just go to the housing page on the website, fill out the form, and pay the deposit to secure your spot.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了住宿申请流程
语言准确性：语法和时态使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合日常英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'apply', 'housing', 'process' 或相关词

content.speakerText: Your research sounds fascinating. Could you tell me a bit more about your approach?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的研究听起来很有趣，能跟我讲讲你的研究方法吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course! I took a mixed-methods approach—combining surveys with in-depth interviews to get both breadth and depth.
I focused on qualitative analysis because I wanted to understand participants’ experiences in detail.
I designed a longitudinal study with pre- and post-tests to track changes over time.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰回应了对方对方法的询问
语言准确性：术语使用是否准确（如 mixed-methods, longitudinal）
表达自然度：是否像真实对话一样流畅，有适当停顿和语气
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 approach, method, study, analysis, interviews 等关键词
